events.title: Frosted Mug Bike Night
events.description: Weekly bike night at Frosted Mug in OKC. All motorcycles welcome for this family-friendly gathering. Great food, drinks, and fellow riders.
events.address: 1800 S Meridian Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73108

events.title: Jamesville Y Bar Bike Night
events.description: Thursday evening bike night near Tulsa. Great atmosphere for riders to connect and enjoy the evening together.

events.title: Rock Away Tavern Old School Bike Night
events.description: Old school motorcycles featured at this weekly Thursday gathering near Guthrie. Classic bikes and great people.

events.title: Road House Saturday Bike Night
events.description: Saturday evening bike night in OKC with free food at 8 PM! Live music and great atmosphere for riders.

events.title: Biker Heaven Saturday Meetup
events.description: Weekly Saturday meetup at Biker Heaven in Tulsa. Free drinks for riders, plus check out their motorcycle gear and accessories.

events.title: Bikes on Bell Shawnee
events.description: Weekly Wednesday bike night in Shawnee. Great evening gathering spot for local riders.

events.title: Oklahoma Bike Week - Rally for Veterans 2025
events.description: Veterans-focused motorcycle rally at the Route 66 Rally Grounds. Features live bands, vendors, camping, and all-weather amenities. Support our veterans while riding!

events.title: After Sturgis Party 2025
events.description: The ultimate post-Sturgis celebration! Continue the party at Route 66 Rally Grounds with live bands, bike games, vendors, and camping. 21+ adults only event.

events.title: 3rd Annual HOG Roast and Poker Run 2025
events.description: Harley Owners Group charity event at Diamondback Harley-Davidson. Enjoy a poker run through scenic Oklahoma and support local causes.

events.title: Fall Halloween Rally 2025
events.description: Halloween-themed biker rally with costume contests, live bands, vendors, and camping. Get spooky with fellow riders! 21+ adults only.

events.title: RockFest 2025
events.description: Music and motorcycle festival in Davis, Oklahoma. Multiple days of live rock music combined with the riding lifestyle.

events.title: Spring Cabin Fever Rally 2026
events.description: Kick off the riding season at Route 66 Rally Grounds! Shake off winter with live bands, vendors, camping, and the famous clothing-optional pond. 21+ adults only.

events.title: LAMA Poker Run 2026
events.description: Charity poker run starting at Diamondback Harley-Davidson in Lawton. Scenic ride through Oklahoma with prizes and community.

events.title: Rollout at Route 66 Harley-Davidson 2026
events.description: See the new 2026 Harley-Davidson lineup! Features music, food, and family fun during the Tulsa Bike Rally weekend. Free admission.

events.title: 16th Annual Harley Party for Boys & Girls Clubs 2026
events.description: Charity event benefiting Boys & Girls Clubs of Bartlesville. Win a chance for a 2025 Harley-Davidson Street Bob! Live music and great cause.

events.title: HVFD Red Line Poker Run & Rally 2026
events.description: Fire department charity poker run supporting local heroes. Scenic route through Oklahoma with rally at the end.

events.title: BikeStock Oklahoma 2026
events.description: Old-school biker party on Route 66! Multiple days of live bands, contests, RV/tent camping, and the famous clothing-optional pond. 21+ adults only.

events.title: Black Wall Street Rally 2026
events.description: Historic motorcycle festival in Tulsa's Greenwood District. Features Harley demo rides, bike show, live music, vendors, history tours, sound competition, and concert. Celebrate Black Wall Street's legacy!

events.title: Route 66 Bike Week 2026
events.description: Major summer motorcycle rally on historic Route 66. Live bands, bike games, vendors, and camping at the famous Route 66 Rally Grounds. 21+ adults only.

events.title: Sturgis After Party 2026
events.description: Post-Sturgis celebration at Route 66 Rally Grounds. Continue the legendary ride with Oklahoma's biggest after-party. Live bands, vendors, camping. 21+ adults only.

events.title: Fall Biker Rally 2026
events.description: End the riding season in style at Route 66 Rally Grounds. Live bands, vendors, camping, and cooler weather riding. 21+ adults only.

events.title: Penny's Poker Run
events.description: Join us for this exciting poker run! We will have raffles and auction items that day! All vehicles welcome including cages and bikes. Let's make this a success with a great turnout!

events.title: Viet Nam Vets Legacy Vets MC - Welcome Back to OKC Party
events.description: Come welcome the Viet Nam Vets Legacy Vets MC back into Oklahoma City! Win prizes and 50/50 raffles. Listen to good music and have a blast with fellow riders.
events.organizer: Viet Nam Vets Legacy Vets MC

events.title: Tulsa Cycle Swap Meet 2025
events.description: All makes and models welcome at this outdoor swap meet. Buy, sell, and trade motorcycle parts, gear, and bikes. Great place to find deals on used parts!

events.title: Guthrie Motorcycle Swap Meet - Fall 2025
events.description: Indoor, climate-controlled swap meet at Logan County Fairgrounds. All makes welcome with outdoor spaces available too. Find Harley parts, vintage items, and more!

events.title: 52nd Annual Tulsa Swap Meet 2026
events.description: Oklahoma's biggest swap meet with over 900 vendor spaces including a dedicated motorcycle swap meet area! Free admission and parking. Rain or shine event with food at Crankshaft Cafe.

events.title: Guthrie Motorcycle Swap Meet - Spring 2026
events.description: Indoor climate-controlled swap meet perfect for finding Harley parts and vintage motorcycle items. Clean facilities with outdoor options and table rentals available.

events.title: Guthrie Motorcycle Swap Meet - Fall 2026
events.description: The fall edition of Guthrie's popular motorcycle swap meet. Indoor climate-controlled venue with all makes welcome. Great for finding parts and meeting fellow riders!

events.title: Thunder & Lightning in the Wichitas - OK CMA State Rally 2026
events.description: Oklahoma CMA State Rally in the scenic Wichita Mountains. A gathering of Christian motorcyclists for fellowship, worship, and riding.

events.title: GOAT X Rally 2026
events.description: GOAT X Rally - an exciting motorcycle rally event in Disney, Oklahoma featuring live music, vendors, and great riding routes.

events.title: Watonga Bikes & BBQ Rally 2026
events.description: Bikes & BBQ Rally in Watonga - combining great motorcycle riding with delicious BBQ. Live music, vendors, and bike show.

events.title: Motoplayground Roots Tour Round 4 Ponca City MX
events.description: Motoplayground Roots Tour Round 4 at Ponca City MX track. Motocross racing action featuring amateur and pro riders.

events.title: Harley-Davidson World Burnout at Shaffers Place
events.description: Harley-Davidson World Burnout competition at Shaffers Place. Watch incredible burnout performances and motorcycle showcases.

events.title: Seaba Station Motorcycle Swap Meet
events.description: Motorcycle swap meet at historic Seaba Station on Route 66. Find parts, accessories, and vintage motorcycle treasures.

events.title: White Trash Bash Poker Run
events.description: White Trash Bash Poker Run - a fun charity poker run event starting in Enid. Proceeds benefit local charities.

events.title: Bikers Bible Retreat
events.description: Bikers Bible Retreat at Big Cedar - a spiritual retreat for motorcycle enthusiasts featuring fellowship, worship, and scenic rides.

events.title: Iron Thunder 5-State Run
events.description: Iron Thunder 5-State Run - an epic poker run that crosses through 5 states! Starting in Guymon, Oklahoma.

events.title: High Heels & Horsepower
events.description: High Heels & Horsepower event in Oklahoma City - celebrating women riders and automotive enthusiasts.

events.title: Harley-Davidson x Smithsonian
events.description: Harley-Davidson x Smithsonian exhibit in Tulsa - featuring motorcycle history, culture, and iconic bikes from the Smithsonian collection.

events.title: Motoplayground Roots Tour Round 5 Full Throttle MX
events.description: Motoplayground Roots Tour Round 5 at Full Throttle MX in Okmulgee. Exciting motocross racing action.

events.title: 5th Annual Marine Corps League Dice Run
events.description: 5th Annual Marine Corps League Dice Run in Lawton. Support our veterans while enjoying a great ride with fellow bikers.

events.title: 14th Annual Special Care Ride for Kids
events.description: 14th Annual Special Care Ride for Kids - a charity poker run benefiting children with special needs in Oklahoma City area.

events.title: BFC 5th Annual Poker Chip Run
events.description: BFC 5th Annual Poker Chip Run starting in Claremore. Collect poker chips at stops for a chance to win prizes.

events.title: The 2026 Distinguished Gentleman's Ride - Oklahoma
events.description: The Distinguished Gentleman's Ride - a global charity ride raising funds for men's health. Dress dapper, ride classic and vintage motorcycles.

events.title: Poncho Rides Again Poker Run
events.description: Poncho Rides Again Poker Run at Big Cedar - a memorial poker run honoring a beloved rider with scenic routes.

events.title: Tail of the Dragon Tour
events.description: Tail of the Dragon Tour departing from Tulsa - an epic week-long ride to the famous Tail of the Dragon and back.

events.title: Land, Air, Water Power Sports Expo 2026
events.description: Land, Air, Water Power Sports Expo featuring motorcycles, ATVs, boats, and more. Vendors, demos, and family fun.

events.title: 2nd Annual Orland Volunteer Fire Department Poker Run
events.description: 2nd Annual poker run benefiting the Orlando Volunteer Fire Department. Support your local firefighters!

events.title: Sparks Oklahoma Bike Week 2026
events.description: Sparks Oklahoma Bike Week - a week-long motorcycle rally featuring live music, vendors, bike shows, and great riding.

events.title: Villain Arts Tattoo Festival - Oklahoma City
events.description: Villain Arts Tattoo Festival in OKC - featuring world-class tattoo artists, live entertainment, and vendor marketplace.

events.title: Motoplayground Roots Tour Round 6 Game Moto
events.description: Motoplayground Roots Tour Round 6 at Game Moto in Tecumseh. Motocross racing featuring amateur and pro classes.

events.title: 10th Annual Ride to the Farm
events.description: 10th Annual Ride to the Farm - a multi-day motorcycle party in Tahlequah featuring camping, live music, and great riding.

events.title: Tulsa ABATE Motorcycle Drag Races
events.description: Tulsa ABATE Motorcycle Drag Races - head-to-head motorcycle drag racing action. All bikes welcome to compete.

events.title: Labor Day Fest at Dall's Biker Camp
events.description: Labor Day Fest at Dall's Biker Camp in Big Cedar - celebrating the end of summer with live music, camping, and great riding.

events.title: Combat Veterans Motorcycle Association 13th Annual Bug Run
events.description: CVMA 13th Annual Bug Run - a poker run supporting combat veterans. Great riding and camaraderie with fellow riders.

events.title: Sparks Halloween Biker Bash 2026
events.description: Sparks Halloween Biker Bash - a spooky motorcycle rally with costume contests, live music, and Halloween festivities.

clubs.name: Tulsa Sportbike Riders
clubs.description: Tulsa's premier sport bike riding group! We specialize in sport riding with a focus on sportbikes like R1, CBR, ZX, and GSX-R. Join us for group rides through the Ozarks, track days at Hallett, and weekly meetups.
clubs.contactInfo: Find us on Facebook: Tulsa Sportbike Riders
clubs.meetingSchedule: Weekly rides - check Facebook for announcements

clubs.name: OKC Sportbike Riders
clubs.description: Oklahoma City's dedicated sport bike community! We organize track days at Hallett Motor Racing Circuit, group rides on Route 66, and weekly meetups. All sport bike riders welcome - R1, R6, CBR, ZX, GSX-R, and more!
clubs.contactInfo: Find us on Facebook: OKC Sportbike Riders

clubs.name: Oklahoma Sportbike Association
clubs.description: The official statewide organization for sport bike enthusiasts in Oklahoma. We coordinate OKC-Tulsa runs, Turnpike Twists, and advocate for rider safety. Join us for the OK Bike Rally and other major events!
clubs.contactInfo: Find us on Facebook: Oklahoma Sportbike Association

clubs.name: Green Country Sport Bikes
clubs.description: Covering the Tulsa to OKC corridor for sport bike riders. We organize dyno meets, group buys for parts, and safety-focused rides. All sport bike makes and models welcome!
clubs.contactInfo: Find us on Facebook: Green Country Sport Bikes

clubs.name: OKC Supersport Riders
clubs.description: High-performance sport bike enthusiasts in Oklahoma City. We focus on canyon carving in the Wichita Mountains and spirited street rides. For serious sport bike riders!
clubs.contactInfo: Find us on Facebook: OKC Supersport Riders

clubs.name: Oklahoma Crotch Rockets & Supersports
clubs.description: Pure sport bike focus for all of Oklahoma! Heavy OKC and Tulsa presence with live ride GPS shares, crash avoidance tips, and group rides. All supersport and sport bike riders welcome!

clubs.name: Storm Riders HOG
clubs.description: A family-like community of Harley-Davidson enthusiasts based at Fort Thunder Harley-Davidson in Moore. We emphasize shared rides, events, and the bonds of brotherhood. All Harley riders welcome!
clubs.location: Fort Thunder Harley-Davidson, 500 SW 11th St, Moore, OK

clubs.name: Oklahoma City HOG
clubs.description: The official Harley Owners Group chapter for Oklahoma City and Edmond area. Casual riding group for Harley owners with monthly meetings and group rides throughout central Oklahoma.

clubs.name: Route 66 H.O.G.
clubs.description: Tulsa's premier Harley Owners Group chapter at Route 66 Harley-Davidson. Free local membership with national H.O.G. for recent Harley buyers. Open group rides and events year-round!

clubs.name: Diamondback H.O.G.
clubs.description: Lawton area's Harley Owners Group chapter at Diamondback Harley-Davidson. Family-friendly rides around Comanche County and the Wichita Mountains. All Harley riders welcome!

clubs.name: OKC Freedom Riders Central Chapter
clubs.description: Beginner-friendly motorcycle club founded in 2002. We focus on casual cruising, charity rides, and the open-road experience. Strong military and veteran interests. All bikes welcome!

clubs.name: 918 Riderz MC
clubs.description: Community-focused motorcycle club in the Tulsa area (918 area code). We enjoy casual cruising and open-road riding with a brotherhood atmosphere. All riders welcome!

clubs.name: Indian Motorcycle Riders Group - Chapter 1966
clubs.description: Open to all Indian motorcycle owners and enthusiasts! Monthly meetings and rides for Indian motorcycle riders in Oklahoma. Based at Indian Motorcycles of Oklahoma.

clubs.name: American Veterans Motorcycle Club - Tulsa
clubs.description: Veteran-focused motorcycle group dedicated to the freedom of riding. Supporting our veterans while enjoying the open road together. All veterans and supporters welcome!

clubs.name: Blue Knights Oklahoma IV
clubs.description: Law enforcement motorcycle club for active and retired law enforcement officers. Brotherhood, charity rides, and supporting our communities through motorcycling.

clubs.name: Gold Wing Road Riders Association - Oklahoma Chapter E
clubs.description: For Honda Gold Wing touring enthusiasts! We focus on long-distance touring, casual cruising, and fellowship. If you love touring bikes, join us!

clubs.name: Tulsa Trail Riders
clubs.description: Off-road and dirt bike club promoting competition and racing in the Tulsa area. If you love getting dirty on two wheels, this is your crew!
clubs.meetingSchedule: Regular trail rides and competition events

clubs.name: Southern Cruisers Riding Club - Chapter 132
clubs.description: Family-oriented riding club promoting safe riding and fellowship across Oklahoma. All motorcycle makes and models welcome. No dues, no politics - just riding!

clubs.name: Midwest Sportbike Riders
clubs.description: Regional sport bike group covering Oklahoma, Kansas, and Arkansas. Join us for cross-state rides to Kansas' Flint Hills and Arkansas' scenic routes. OKC and Tulsa riders very active!
clubs.contactInfo: Find us on Facebook: Midwest Sportbike Riders

clubs.name: SurvivorsMC Tulsa Tribe
clubs.description: Brotherhood of clean and sober bikers emphasizing community support and casual cruising. If you're in recovery and love motorcycles, you've found your tribe!
